steps.title: Follow the invention story
steps.content: The passage moves from Reyes's book-digitizing problem to the security test she invented from that problem. Most of the text explains what the first reCAPTCHA test did and why it worked.

steps.title: Separate purpose from background
steps.content: B is too narrow because the passage does not explain scanner mechanics. C treats the digitizing project as the main focus, though it is background for the invention. D adds popularity, which the text never discusses. The answer is A.
